name: Dijiang - Fabulous Beasts
description:
[A joyful creature from 'fabulous beasts]

Since i've already made Hundun, i figured i should do Dijiang as well 🫶

It's kind of the same as before, you can interact as human or creature ヽ('ω')ノ

Also again to note: This character doesn't speak canonly, so if it suddenly dialogues feel free to change the message 🙌

A small warning though 😓 i couldn't find the mini theater about Dijiang in the series so the personality i made is a mix of the first episode where Dijiang and Hundun first appeared and google research 😭
creator: Sushimyuri
